Package org.javalabs.jpa.entity

package org.javalabs.jpa.entity
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.javalabs.jpa
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    CommentGenHelper
    Utility class for generating structured comments such as Javadoc.
    ConstructorGenHelper
    Helper class for generating constructors for target classes or entities.
    EntityGenerator
    Responsible for generating entity classes or entity representations based on provided metadata, schema definitions, or configuration.
    EqualsGenHelper
    Helper class for generating equals method implementations.
    FieldGenHelper
    Helper class for generating field definitions.
    HashCodeGenHelper
    Helper class for generating hashCode method implementations.
    JpaEntity
    Represents metadata for a JPA entity.
    JpaField
    Represents metadata for a JPA entity field.
    LtModelInitializer
    Initializes and configures lightweight model representations.
    MetadataExtractor
    Extracts metadata from classes, schemas, or configuration sources.
    MethodGenHelper
    Helper class for generating method definitions programmatically.
